description: Comprehensive cert-manager monitoring dashboard with certificate status, expiry tracking, ACME client metrics, controller sync metrics, and issuer health. Metrics sourced from cert-manager Prometheus endpoint.
title: cert-manager Monitoring - Prometheus

b1c2d3e4-f5a6-7890-bcde-fa1234567001.name: deployment.environment
b1c2d3e4-f5a6-7890-bcde-fa1234567001.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

b1c2d3e4-f5a6-7890-bcde-fa1234567002.name: namespace
b1c2d3e4-f5a6-7890-bcde-fa1234567002.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') AS `namespace`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status'
GROUP BY `namespace`

widgets.description: Number of certificates in Ready=True state per namespace
widgets.title: Certificates Ready (True)

widgets.description: Number of certificates NOT in Ready state (condition=False or Unknown)
widgets.title: Certificates Not Ready

widgets.description: Certificate expiry timestamps (NotAfter) — lower values indicate certificates expiring sooner
widgets.title: Certificate Expiry Timestamp

widgets.description: Timestamp at which each certificate should be renewed
widgets.title: Certificate Renewal Timestamp

widgets.description: Ready status of namespaced Issuers (1=matching condition, 0=not matching)
widgets.title: Issuer Ready Status

widgets.description: Ready status of ClusterIssuers (cluster-scoped, no namespace)
widgets.title: ClusterIssuer Ready Status

widgets.description: Rate of outbound ACME HTTP requests per second
widgets.title: ACME Request Rate

widgets.description: Average latency of outbound ACME HTTP requests
widgets.title: ACME Average Request Duration

widgets.description: ACME HTTP requests grouped by HTTP status code
widgets.title: ACME Requests by Status & Action

widgets.description: Rate of sync() calls per controller
widgets.title: Controller Sync Rate

widgets.description: Rate of errors during controller sync() calls
widgets.title: Controller Sync Error Rate

widgets.description: Status of ACME certificate challenges (ready, valid, errored, pending, etc.)
widgets.title: ACME Challenge Status
